case_title: MERI MERI INC. VS. SWB CONSULTING INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL RECEIVED -NO FILING FEE RECEIVED. FILED BY DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERI MERI INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,134.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERI MERI INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERI MERI INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $167.31 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY MERI MERI INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWB CONSULTING INC.
